title: La sociedad rota de Reino Unido
summary: El autor compara el varapalo electoral que ha sufrido Keir Starmer con la prevista victoria de Juanma Moreno en las elecciones andaluzas. Leer

title: Los pasajeros españoles del Hondius ya están en el Gómez Ulla
summary: Los catorce españoles deberán estar en cuarentena y completamente aislados por un tiempo indeterminado. Por el momento están todos asintomáticos. Leer

title: Nuevo revés judicial a los aranceles de Donald Trump: ¿y ahora qué?
summary: La decisión de la Corte de Comercio Internacional de EEUU solo se aplica a los demandantes y no anula el arancel universal a nivel global, de forma que seguirá en vigor hasta el verano. Leer

title: EEUU revocará el pasaporte a progenitores con una deuda de manutención infantil "significativa"
summary: Las revocaciones afectarán a progenitores que deban más de 2.500 dólares de manutención infantil, pero se están concentrando inicialmente en ciudadanos con grandes deudas acumuladas, de 100.000 dólares o más, según el canal 'Fox News'. Leer

title: Spain says it took 'all measures' to stop hantavirus amid new positive cases
summary: Spanish authorities on Monday said they took "all measures" to prevent hantavirus spreading from evacuees on a cruise ship hit by the virus, after French and US nationals tested positive.

title: Today in Spain: A roundup of the latest news on Monday
summary: Barça claim La Liga title with Clásico win over Real Madrid, two suspected Hantavirus cases in Barcelona and Alicante test negative and more news on Monday, May 11th.

title: Covid flashbacks haunt Spain's Canary Islands as hantavirus ship docks
summary: Six years after registering Spain's first Covid case, locals in the Canary Islands are both worried and angry about the arrival of a cruise ship struck by a deadly hantavirus outbreak, reviving painful memories.

title: US and French citizens on hantavirus ship that docked in Spain test positive
summary: An American national and a French woman evacuated from the cruise ship hit by a deadly hantavirus outbreak have tested positive, officials said Monday, as the complex operation to repatriate those on board continued.

title: Evacuation of hantavirus-hit ship begins in Spain's Canary Islands
summary: The occupants of a cruise ship struck by a deadly hantavirus outbreak began leaving the vessel in Spain's Canary Islands on Sunday, amid growing international concern about the rare disease.

title: WHO chief tells Spain's Tenerife that risk from hantavirus-hit ship 'low'
summary: The WHO chief told the people of Tenerife Saturday that the risk to them from an arriving cruise ship hit with a deadly hantavirus outbreak was "low".

title: Two Spanish civil guards killed in drug chase crash
summary: Spain's Civil Guard said two of its officers were killed on Friday after their boats collided while chasing suspected drug traffickers in the Atlantic.
